title: Joc Sah
content:
{{Top|fga|leg}} {{Youmay|the [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] [[Padawan/Legends|Padawan]]|[[Joc|the clone trooper]]}} {{Character |type=Jedi |image=[[File:Joc.jpg]] |name=Joc Sah |homeworld= |birth= |death= |species=[[Human/Legends|Human]]{{CWACite|5|The Order of Outcasts}} |gender=[[Gender/Legends|Male]] |pronouns=new |height= |mass= |hair=Blond |feathers= |eyes=[[Color/Legends|Blue]] |skin=Light |cyber= |families=new |parents=new |partners=new |siblings=new |children=new |affiliation=*[[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]] *[[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] |masters=[[Sev (Jedi)|Sev]] {{C|[[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]]}} |apprentices= }} {{Quote|Master Sev, come in. Something…''horrible'' has happened.''"
"''You've been betrayed. You're one of us now, Jedi—an unwanted outcast.|Joc Sah and Gaan|}} '''Joc Sah''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] [[Padawan/Legends|Padawan]] who served as a [[Jedi Commander/Legends|commander]] during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]]. In the war's [[19 BBY/Legends|final year]], Sah and his [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]], [[Sev (Jedi)|Sev]], were dispatched to the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim]] [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Ragmar V]], which was considered a vital staging world for a planned assault on a [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Separatist]] base. Sah and a [[Squad/Legends|squad]] of [[Clone trooper/Legends|clone troopers]] traveled to the planet's surface to secure an outpost, but after their [[Low Altitude Assault Transport/infantry/Legends|gunship]] was destroyed, Sah and his [[Soldier/Legends|soldiers]] confronted the nearby settlement's leader, [[Gaan]], and his group of outcasts. As Sah and Gaan prepared to fight each other, [[Clone Sergeant/Legends|Clone Sergeant]] [[Remy (clone trooper)|Remy]] was commanded by [[Supreme Chancellor/Legends|Supreme Chancellor]] [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]] to execute [[Order 66/Legends|Order 66]], an [[Contingency Orders for the Grand Army of the Republic: Order Initiation, Orders 1 Through 150|order]] that branded the [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knights]] traitors to the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Republic]]. Remy and the members of the squad immediately [[Battle of Ragmar V|attacked]] Sah, who temporarily joined forces with Gaan and eliminated the [[Trooper/Legends|troopers]]. When Sah realized that he had been betrayed by the Republic, he allied with Gaan and his fellow pariahs in order to combat the detachment of [[Cloning/Legends|clones]] that had been sent to ensure Sah's [[Death/Legends|demise]]. ==Biography== {{Quote|''Ragmar V'' is a vital staging planet for the upcoming assault on the Separatist base. A victory would turn the tide in this war. You must secure an outpost, Joc.''"
"''I know…I was just hoping for some real action for my first solo mission.''"
"''Sometimes the smallest fights become the biggest battles. Stay on your guard.|Sah and Sev|}} [[File:RemyAndJoc.jpg|left|thumb|300px|Joc Sah and [[Remy (clone trooper)|Remy]] carry out a mission on the surface of the planet [[Ragmar V]]]] Joc Sah, a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]], was born during the final [[Standard year/Legends|decades]] of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]]. He was [[Jedi training/Legends|trained]] in the ways of [[The Force/Legends|the Force]] by the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]], and as a [[Padawan/Legends|Padawan]], he eventually came under the tutelage of the [[Weequay/Legends|Weequay]] [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Sev (Jedi)|Sev]]. When the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]] were [[First Battle of Geonosis/Legends|initiated]] in [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]],{{Film|II}} Sah became a [[Jedi Commander/Legends|commander]] in the [[Grand Army of the Republic/Legends|Grand Army of the Republic]], and helped lead the [[Clone trooper/Legends|clone forces]] alongside his Master. In [[19 BBY/Legends|19 BBY]], Sah and Sev traveled to [[Ragmar V]], a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]] that was considered an essential staging world for a planned Republic assault on a [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Separatist]] base. Sev instructed Sah to take a squad of [[Cloning/Legends|clones]], land on the planet's surface, and secure an outpost. Sah, accompanied by [[Clone Sergeant/Legends|Clone Sergeant]] [[Remy (clone trooper)|Remy]] and other [[Trooper/Legends|troopers]], entered Ragmar V's [[Atmosphere/Legends|atmosphere]] aboard a [[Low Altitude Assault Transport/infantry/Legends|LAAT/i gunship]]. He conversed with Sev, stating that he had hoped for a more active mission for his first task on his own; however, Sev warned the Padawan to stay alert, stating that on occasion the most minor fights became the largest battles. [[File:GaamAndJocSahUnderFire.jpg|thumb|right|300px|Joc Sah and Gaan came under a sudden attack from [[Clone trooper/Legends|clone troopers]]]] After landing on a cliff and disembarking, Sah was informed by Remy of a settlement a few [[Kilometer/Legends|klicks]] from their location. However, the [[Starship/Legends|ship]] was destroyed by a [[Missile/Legends|rocket]] fired from the village, and Sah and his [[Troop/Legends|troops]] descended from the cliff in order to [[Battle of Ragmar V|confront]] the villagers. As they approached the [[City/Legends|town]], Sah ordered Remy to split the [[Soldier/Legends|soldiers]] and secure the flanks while he spoke with the settlement's leader,{{CSWECite|III|123|Sah, Joc}} Gaan.{{CSWECite|I|305|Gaan}} The leader stated that the Republic was unwelcome on the planet, and Sah replied that there was an [[Assault ship/Legends|assault ship]] that countered Gaan's argument. As the two prepared to fight each other, Remy received a [[Contingency Orders for the Grand Army of the Republic: Order Initiation, Orders 1 Through 150|directive]] from [[Supreme Chancellor/Legends|Supreme Chancellor]] [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]] commanding him to execute [[Order 66/Legends|Order 66]], which labeled the [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knights]] traitors to the Republic. Remy and the clones attacked Sah, who ordered them to cease firing as he took cover in a nearby building. Sah was soon joined by Gaan, who was also attacked by the clones, and the Padawan attempted to reach Sev, who had been executed, over his [[Comlink/Legends|comlink]]. When Gaan asked Sah to temporarily ally with him in order to eliminate the clones, Sah accepted and helped him defeat the soldiers. [[File:JocSahToFight.jpg|left|thumb|300px|Joc Sah, along Gaan, goes into battle]] After defeating the troops, Sah openly questioned why the clones had attacked him and tried once more to reach Sev over his comlink. Gaan replied that he had been betrayed and that he was now in Gaan's and his group's position of being an outcast. Sah accepted Gaan's offer of friendship, warning him that the clones would send more troops against the settlement. When a detachment of troopers landed on the surface to ensure Sah's death, the Padawan and Gaan engaged the soldiers in battle. Both Sah and Gaan survived the battle and staged a number of hit-and-run attacks against the clones. ==Personality and traits== {{Quote|The enemy of your enemy is your friend. We're all you've got now.''"
"''They'll be sending troops…more than we can handle.''"
"''Do we look the type that run away from a fight?|Sah and Gaan|}} [[File:SkillOfJoc.jpg|right|thumb|300px|Joc Sah demonstrates his [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] abilities during the battle]] The Human male Joc Sah wore a set of [[Color/Legends|brown]] [[Jedi apparel/Legends|Jedi robes]] and owned a [[Lightsaber/Legends|lightsaber]] containing a green [[Lightsaber crystal/Legends|crystal]]. He was eager to fight in the more major battles of the Clone Wars and initially wished that his first solo mission involved more action. He was confident that he and his forces could conquer Gaan's settlement and was shocked when the clones betrayed and attacked him. Sah was at first hesitant to ally himself with Gaan and his people, but accepted Gaan's offer of friendship after realizing that the Republic had betrayed him. ==Powers and abilities== Joc Sah was skilled in using a lightsaber during combat, using it to deflect [[Blaster/Legends|blaster]] fire. He was also skilled in using the Force to [[Telekinesis/Legends|move objects]], such as when he redirected a [[Thermal detonator/Legends|thermal detonator]] back at the clone troopers who attacked him. ==Behind the scenes== Joc Sah was introduced in the short [[Star Wars comic books|comic-book]] story ''[[The Order of Outcasts]]'', which was one of four stories compiled in the [[Star Wars: Clone Wars Adventures Volume 5|fifth volume]] of the [[Star Wars: Clone Wars Adventures (graphic novels)|''Star Wars: Clone Wars Adventures'']] [[Star Wars comic books|trade paperbacks]]. The character was created by [[Matt Jacobs]] and drawn by [[Matthew Fillbach|Matthew]] and [[Shawn Fillbach]]. Although the comic itself gives only his first name, the back cover of ''Clone Wars Adventures: Volume 5'' identifies him as Joc Sah. Sah later received an entry in ''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'', which states that the Padawan, Gaan, and the other criminals fled into the desert after fleeing Remy and his troops. This contradicts ''The Order of Outcasts'', which depicts the characters staying in the village after defeating Remy's clones, then preparing for the clone detachment sent to eliminate Sah. ==Appearances== {{Mediacat|imagecat=Images of Joc Sah}} *{{CWACite|5|The Order of Outcasts}} {{1st}} ==Sources== *''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{Interlang |nl=Joc Sah }} {{DEFAULTSORT:Sah, Joc}} [[Category:Humans]] [[Category:Jedi Commanders]] [[Category:Jedi Purge survivors]] [[Category:Jedi trainees of the Jedi Order]] [[Category:Males]] [[Category:Post-Ruusan Jedi]]
